title: Weekly Strategy Review Checklist
description: A 15-minute Friday checklist for reviewing strategic priority progress, flagging blockers, and setting next week's focus.

sections.title: Priority Status
sections.description: Rate each quarterly priority's progress this week
fields: Priority 1: [name] — On Track / At Risk / Blocked
Priority 2: [name] — On Track / At Risk / Blocked
Priority 3: [name] — On Track / At Risk / Blocked

sections.title: Blockers
sections.description: Anything preventing progress on strategic priorities
fields: Blocker 1: What is it? Who can unblock it? Cost of leaving it?
Blocker 2: What is it? Who can unblock it? Cost of leaving it?
Any blocker from last week that is still unresolved?

sections.title: Strategic Signals
sections.description: Anything you heard or observed that could affect strategy
fields: Action needed? (yes/no — if yes, add to next week)

sections.title: Next Week Focus
sections.description: The single most important strategic move for next week
fields: Needle mover: What is the one thing I will advance?
How will I protect this from daily noise?
What will I say NO to this week to make room?

howToUse: Complete every Friday in 15 minutes. Do not overthink it — the value is in the consistency, not the depth. Over time, the weekly signals section becomes a powerful pattern-recognition tool. Review 4 weeks of checklists during your quarterly planning session.
